description: Thickness-gauge round trip: steel wall cross-section with coupled probe, T = ? depth bracket and 5.92 mm/µs tag; pulse draws down to the back wall and back while a stopwatch sweeps and freezes at 8.45 µs; formula card T = v × t ÷ 2 (÷ 2 brightens on echo return) solves 5.92 × 8.45 ÷ 2 = 25.0 mm and the bracket flips to 25.0 mm.
